title: Mink Bollis
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image= |name=Mink Bollis |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]][[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I assure you that Moff Glovstoak and the entire sector government stand ready to assist you in your need. Why don't we find a quiet corner where you can give me some details of your situation?''"
"''That would be— That would be wonderful.''"
"''Let me take you someplace where you can lie down.|Mink Bollis and Emperor's Hand Mara Jade, under the pseudonym of Countess Claria|}} '''Mink Bollis''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] that served as one of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Glovstoak]]'s [[Aide/Legends|aides]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], [[Gender/Legends|he]] attended [[Glovstoak's party|one]] of his superior's parties in his [[Glovstoak's palace|palace]], where he met [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] as [[Countess/Legends|Countess]] Claria after being introduced to her by Imperial [[General/Legends|General]] [[Deerian]]. Bollis invited her to be alone with him; however, Deerian intervened, bringing the Emperor's Hand to an office separated from the aide. ==Biography== {{Quote|You're, what? Eighteen? Nineteen?''"
"''Eighteen.''"
"''I have a granddaughter that age. I wouldn't want her alone with Bollis, either. Sleep as long as you want, Countess. I'll make sure you're not disturbed.|General Deerian and Emperor's Hand Mara Jader, under the pseudonym of Countess Claria|}} [[File:Mara_Jade_Dancer.jpg|250px|thumb|Mink Bollis met Emperor's Hand Mara Jade (left) at one of Moff Glovstoak's parties.]] Mink Bollis was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as an [[Aide/Legends|aide]] to [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Glovstoak]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of [[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] to [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. Bollis attended [[Glovstoak's party|one]] of Glovstoak's parties in his [[Glovstoak's palace|palace]]. He encountered Imperial [[General/Legends|General]] [[Deerian]], who had spoken with the eighteen-[[Standard year/Legends|years]]-old [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]]—who was operating under the pseudonym of [[Countess/Legends|Countess]] Claria—about her [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] problems and thought Bollis could help Jade, introducing the aide to her. Bollis, who kissed the young woman's hand in [[Old Core era|Old Core fashion]], assured the Emperor's Hand that Glovstoak and his [[Sector/Legends|sector's]] government were ready to assist her, inviting her to a quiet corner where she could give him details about her situation. Jade then made it seem as if a beverage she had been drinking, [[ambrostine]], had affected her. Knowing that drinking too much ambrostine could result in loss of inhibitions, the aide invited her to follow him to a place where she could lie down; however, Deerian stopped him and separated Jade from Bollis, bringing her to an office, where he confessed that he would not want her or his [[Deerian's granddaughter|granddaughter]] alone with Bollis. ==Personality and traits== The aide had a "predator's gaze," and Jade speculated that when they met, pirate problems were the last thing on Bollis's mind. He was younger than Deerian. ==Behind the scenes== Mink Bollis first appeared in [[Timothy Zahn]]'s [[2006]] novel [[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']]. ==Appearances== *[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] {{Ab|Allegiance (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Mink Bollis }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Bollis, Mink}} [[Category:Clerical workers and assistants]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Personnel of the Galactic Empire]]
